summary: Crispy high‑end soundboard recording with decent balance, but not broadcast‑quality; no performance details provided.
review: The tape was sourced from a Streeter soundboard using Sennheiser 421 microphones, delivering a crisp high end that some describe as slightly brittle. Reviewers note the cassette source isn’t master quality yet still offers a good overall balance compared with grainier audience recordings. No specific comments on the musical performance or setlist are given.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review focusing on recording quality (rated 4 stars). Show quality is unknown, so rating reflects a good but not exceptional recording with limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp high‑end sound from Sennheiser 421 mics on cassette source; slight brittleness in highs, not broadcast/master quality but better than typical audience tapes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details mentioned in reviews.
